calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Probate Of Will
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Eliot Lippman appearing for and with petitioner Peter Flaxman. Helen Carter and Evelyn Morton are in court. They do not have any opposition. Court is granting both petitions and Peter Flaxman is appointed the executor with full authority and no bond. Two orders signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition Of Special Administrator For Order Deeming Objections Of Norman Jones Waived, Admitting The Will Of Willie Reed, Deceased, To Probate, And Appointing Peter Flaxman Executor
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Probate Of Will
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Continued To Jan-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Eliot Lippman appearing for special administrator. Contest was filed but not properly served. Mr. Lippman will have to get rid of the contest before the Will can be admitted. He is to look for the proper way to address the contest. Matter is continued to 1/22/07. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Karla Davis, CSR#12998. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Probate Of Will
Off Calendar Nov-27-2006 Continued To Dec-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Probate Of Will
Off Calendar Sep-25-2006 Continued To Nov-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Eliot Lippman appearing for petitioner/special administrator. No other appearance made. Mr. Jones has filed a contest. The Special Administrator will have to answer the contest. Court is extending the Special Letters until further order of court. Order signed. Matter is continued to 11/27. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Probate Of Will
Off Calendar Aug-28-2006 Continued To Sep-25-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Eliot Lippman appearing for petitioner. Norman Jones is in court. Court asks Mr. Jones why his objection is not on filed. Mr. Jones informs the court that his counsel is Roger Meredith and he does not know why he is not in court today. His brother is trying to get a document from Mr. Meredith's office. Court is appointing Mr. Flaxman as special administrator with general powers and full independent powers with no bond. Will is not admitted today. Letter will expire on 9/25. Matter is continued to 9/25. Order was filed in error on 8/14. Court will issue an order to vacate the 8/14 order and to void the Letters issued. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARENCES BY PETER FLAXMAN,PETITIONER; NORMAN JONES, OBJECTOR
MR JONES WISHES TO OBJECT TO THIS PETITION. COURT IS GOING TO ALLOW HIM TIME TO TO SUBMIT HIS OBJECTION. iF HES HAS NOT FILED AN OBJECTION BY 8/28/06 THIS ORDER WILL STAND.
COMM:DOROTHY MCMATH; CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; RPTR:CHRISTINA PAXTON
